IonQ.rationale: Trimmed growth toward fresh YoY of ~44%; still high-growth pure-play but below prior 0.6 anchor.

Astera Labs.rationale: Lowered slightly toward fresh YoY of ~17.5% TTM but kept elevated given strong forward AI connectivity trajectory.

CoreWeave.rationale: unchanged: no fresh YoY provided; high-growth trajectory consistent with prior estimate.

Palantir.rationale: unchanged: fresh YoY ~16.7% TTM understates accelerating commercial trajectory; current value remains reasonable.

Lumentum.rationale: unchanged: fresh YoY ~18% supports continued recovery; value consistent.

Applied Optoelectronics.rationale: Nudged down toward soft fresh YoY of ~11.3% reflecting weaker realized growth.

Micron.rationale: Raised HBM/AI segment rev_bn slightly on strong 55% TTM YoY memory upcycle; growth kept given cyclicality risk.

AMD.rationale: unchanged: fresh total YoY low (~8%) but AI GPU ramp supports forward growth; values retained.

NVIDIA.rationale: Nudged rev_bn up reflecting continued data-center revenue growth in TTM; other inputs durable.

Broadcom.rationale: Slightly raised AI segment rev_bn on continuing custom-ASIC/networking strength; growth unchanged.

Marvell.rationale: unchanged: low total YoY (~6.4%) offset by AI custom-silicon ramp; values retained.

AppLovin.rationale: unchanged: fresh YoY ~6% is total/legacy-weighted; AI ad-engine trajectory supports current value.

Vertiv.rationale: unchanged: fresh YoY ~6% lagging but strong data-center backlog supports forward growth.

Coherent.rationale: unchanged: fresh YoY ~5% consistent with gradual optical recovery.

Meta.rationale: unchanged: AI-driven ad growth trajectory supports value above soft trailing reads.

Oracle.rationale: Nudged up slightly on accelerating OCI/cloud AI infrastructure demand despite modest total YoY.

Microsoft.rationale: unchanged: Azure AI segment growth supports value; total YoY soft but mix-driven.

Texas Instruments.rationale: unchanged: cyclical analog recovery consistent with current value.

Amazon.rationale: unchanged: AWS AI segment trajectory supports value above low total YoY.

Alphabet.rationale: unchanged: cloud/AI growth supports value despite modest total YoY.

Qualcomm.rationale: unchanged: flat-to-negative fresh YoY (~-0.8%) consistent with low growth assumption.

Apple.rationale: unchanged: fresh YoY ~3.6% consistent with mature-growth value.

Cisco.rationale: unchanged: fresh YoY ~2.4% consistent with current value.

IBM.rationale: unchanged: fresh YoY ~1.5% consistent with low-growth assumption.

Tesla.rationale: Trimmed slightly toward weak fresh YoY (~3.2%) reflecting decelerating realized revenue.
